fields.summary: Adding global filter registry: register_filter()/unregister_filter() functions and wiring into Prompt rendering

content:
type: QUESTION
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: I'm adding register_filter()/unregister_filter() global registry that must be merged into every Jinja env (local filters win over global). Can you share the signature of your planned create_jinja_env helper so I hook global filters into it instead of duplicating env-setup logic?

fields.summary: I'm adding register_filter()/unregister_filter() global registry that must be merged into every Jinja env (local filters win over global). Can you share the signature of your planned create_jinja_env helper so I hook global filters into it instead of duplicating env-setup logic?

content:
type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Added _FILTERS registry + register_filter()/unregister_filter() near top of file, and inserted env.filters.update(_FILTERS) in both _template_from_str (before builtin filters) and _template_from_file (right after env creation). When you refactor into create_jinja_env, please keep the _FILTERS module dict and just move the env.filters.update(_FILTERS) call to sit between builtins and your final env.filters.update(filters) call - I'll verify after your change lands.
